mechanism_narrative: A positive trend in real retail sales signals strengthening household demand and near-term revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when RSAFS momentum is rising.
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth fails to produce higher 20-day S&P 500 forward returns, with walk-forward Rank IC below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A crossing into a faster federal funds tightening path raises discount rates and reduces equity duration values, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days after FEDFUNDS rises sharply.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises by more than 0.50pp over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered FEDFUNDS tightening episodes have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward instances or mean triggered returns exceed the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: Joint payroll expansion and falling unemployment indicate broad labor-market healing that raises income growth without signaling immediate recession, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises over 3 months and UNRATE falls by at least 0.2pp over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-up and UNRATE-down signal does not outperform single-series PAYEMS or UNRATE signals, or if triggered 60-day returns are not above baseline at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in industrial production signals weakening goods-sector output and earnings pressure for cyclical firms, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO contraction triggers are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of out-of-sample observations or if the average triggered return is not below baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A high and rising level of housing starts signals strong construction demand and durable-goods spillovers, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses above 1600 and its 3-month change is positive
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST-above-1600-and-rising episodes do not deliver higher 60-day S&P 500 returns than non-triggered periods, or if walk-forward Rank IC is below 0.03 over 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer prices while the federal funds rate remains near zero signals falling real policy rates and future inflation-policy conflict, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth exceeds 4% while FEDFUNDS is below 0.25
failure_condition: Reject if the CPIAUCSL-high and FEDFUNDS-low interaction has no incremental negative effect beyond CPIAUCSL alone, or if triggered 20-day returns are positive in more than 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in an elevated unemployment rate signals reduced recession risk and improving household income prospects, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days after the labor release.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE is above 5.0 and falls by more than 0.2pp over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if elevated-UNRATE improvement triggers do not produce positive 5-day S&P 500 returns more often than 55% of the time in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: A negative real GDP growth print signals broad demand deterioration and downward earnings revisions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if negative GDPC1 growth triggers are followed by 60-day S&P 500 returns above the unconditional mean in out-of-sample testing or if the signal Rank IC is below 0.03.
